query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS page_views (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NULL,
  page VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '/',
  referrer VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  device_type VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'desktop',
  duration_seconds INT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_pv_session (session_id),
  INDEX idx_pv_created (created_at),
  INDEX idx_pv_page (page)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LS6oXFmEKtYAwQA.122d6f8d6c82 --database HSV5ymGbFhd3N83JKd7NgT --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS page_views (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NULL,
  page VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '/',
  referrer VARCHAR(256) NULL,
  device_type VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'desktop',
  duration_seconds INT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_pv_session (session_id),
  INDEX idx_pv_created (created_at),
  INDEX idx_pv_page (page)
);
